features.name: always_comb self_referential bit slice assignment
features.description: Code should include an always_comb block where a slice or bit of a multi-bit signal is assigned using another bit of the same signal (self-referential within the same always block)

features.name: cross_block always_comb signal dependency
features.description: Code should include two always_comb blocks where one block writes to a signal that another block reads from, creating interdependencies

features.name: multiple always_comb with dependent signals and display
features.description: Code should include multiple always_comb blocks with interdependent signals where display statements in each block can cause infinite recursive evaluation
